query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'sent' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sent,
       SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failed,
       SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending
FROM whatsapp_logs;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4xeK7FVQkXBtxe6.root --database 45yCshMdhCKkPUhGJzLrcU --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'sent' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sent,
       SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failed,
       SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending
FROM whatsapp_logs;
